title: Black Sunday
writer: Ennio De Concini, Mario Serandrei, Nikolay Gogol
actors: Barbara Steele, John Richardson, Andrea Checchi
plot: Decades after being executed for witchcraft, vengeful Princess Asa Vajda and her fiendish servant are resurrected and begin a bloody campaign to possess the body of Asa Vajda's beautiful look-alike descendant Princess Katia.
